overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a hooded character exploring a dark, atmospheric city at dusk. The character ascends stairs to the Edward Helliot Center, walks along elevated exterior walkways, and enters an indoor exhibition hall with museum-style displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand building entrance with wide stone staircase

events.description: character reaches top of stairs and transitions from ascending to level walking

agents.ego_description: walking up the wide stone stairs toward the Edward Helliot Center entrance

entered.detail: tall art deco building with illuminated signage and vertical windows
wide stairs with ornate stone balustrades on both sides
vintage style lamp posts with warm yellow glow
large stone planters with small trees and shrubs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide stone staircase toward the imposing Edward Helliot Center building. The scene is set at dusk with a purple sky, illuminated by warm street lamps. Wet pavement reflects the lights, and the building's art deco facade dominates the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated exterior walkway with stone balustrade overlooking city street

events.description: pedestrian in blue coat walks past in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated exterior balcony with stone railings overlooking the street below

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue coat walking in opposite direction along the walkway

entered.detail: ornate stone railing running along the walkway edge
street visible below with wet pavement and distant lights

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated exterior walkway with stone balustrades. The Edward Helliot Center falls behind as the view opens to the city avenue below. A pedestrian in a blue coat passes by in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: monument plaza with large illuminated shield structure and waterfall feature

events.description: character begins descending stairs toward the monument entrance
character enters indoor exhibition hall through large doorway

agents.ego_description: approaching the large shield monument and descending into the covered entrance area

entered.detail: tall illuminated structure with emblem and vertical waterfall feature
doorway with overhead cover leading to indoor space

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a monumental plaza featuring a large illuminated shield structure with water cascading down. The environment becomes more sheltered as the character descends stairs toward a covered entrance leading indoors.

scene_state.functional_zone: museum exhibition hall with wall displays and shop fronts

events.description: transition from outdoor dusk to indoor artificial lighting
passing from entrance hall into main exhibition corridor with display cases

agents.ego_description: walking through the indoor exhibition space observing wall displays and illuminated exhibits

entered.detail: wall-mounted illuminated panels with photographs and descriptive text
storefront with illuminated signage reading Smith & Co
red illuminated sign for Blade Arts Travel Agency
large backlit shield emblem mounted on the far wall

segments.scene_description: Inside the exhibition hall, the character moves through a dimly lit space with polished marble floors and illuminated wall displays. The environment features shop fronts including a travel agency and exhibition panels with backlit artwork. The lighting is entirely artificial, creating a moody museum atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked urban exterior at dusk into the moody, artificial light of an indoor exhibition hall. It begins with the character ascending a wide stone staircase toward the imposing art deco facade of the Edward Helliot Center under a purple sky. As the character reaches the top, the scene shifts to an elevated walkway where the building recedes and the view opens to a city avenue below, passing a pedestrian in a blue coat. The camera then follows the character toward a monumental plaza featuring a cascading water shield before descending stairs into a sheltered entrance. Finally, the environment transitions fully indoors, moving across polished marble floors and past backlit exhibition panels and shop fronts in a dimly lit, museum-like atmosphere.
